de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class TriggersSet.ClauseTrigger

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.TriggersSet.ClauseTrigger
  • Enclosing class:
    TriggersSet

    private class TriggersSet.ClauseTrigger
extends Object
    this class is used to find Triggers in a clause. And it will try to find triggers from every literals in this clause. Every substerm of literal that satify the conditions:(1)it should not be a variable, (2) it doesn't contain propersitional connectives, (3) it is not in loop, (4) it should contains all universal variables in the clause and the first variable of allTerm (5) it doesn't contain subtrigger, will be selected as an Uni-trigger. If a literal does not contain all universal variables in clause, a set of subterms of this literal will be selected as Multi-trigger's elements which are actually uni-triggers except that condition (2) will be changedand into that it contains all universal variables in the literal in. Afterwards, a set of multi-triggers will be constructed by combining thoes elements so that all variables in clause should be include by some of them.

      private ImmutableSet<Trigger> elementsOfMultiTrigger

    • Method Detail

      • createTriggers

        public void createTriggers(Services services)
        Searching uni-triggers and elements of multi-triggers in every literal in this clause and add those uni-triggers to the goal trigger set. At last construct multi-triggers from those elements.

      • recAddTriggers

        private boolean recAddTriggers(Term term,
                               Services services)
        Parameters:
        term - one atom at the begining
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        true if find any trigger from term

                                  int i,
                                  TermServices services)

      • mightContainTriggers

        private boolean mightContainTriggers(Term term)
        Check whether a given term (or a subterm of the term) might be a trigger candidate

      • isAcceptableTrigger

        private boolean isAcceptableTrigger(Term term,
                                    Services services)
        Further criteria for triggers. This is just a HACK, there should be a more general framework for characterising acceptable triggers

      • addUniTrigger

        private void addUniTrigger(Term term,
                           Services services)
        add a uni-trigger to triggers set or add an element of multi-triggers for this clause

      • setMultiTriggers

        private Set<ImmutableSet<Trigger>> setMultiTriggers(Iterator<Trigger> ts)
        find all possible combination of ts. Once a combination of elements contains all variables of this clause, it will be used to construct the multi-trigger which will be add to triggers set
        Parameters:
        ts - elements of multi-triggers at the beginning
        Returns:
        a set of triggers

      • addMultiTrigger

        private boolean addMultiTrigger(ImmutableSet<Trigger> trs)
        try to construct a multi-trigger by given ts
        Parameters:
        trs - a set of trigger
        Returns:
        true if trs contains all universal varaibles of this clause, and add the contstructed multi-trigger to triggers set
